an4.27:1.0.1: "Cattārimāni, bhikkhave, appāni ca sulabhāni ca, tāni ca anavajjāni. Katamāni cattāri?
an4.27:1.0.2: Anavajjena tuṭṭhassa,appena sulabhena ca;Na senāsanamārabbha,cīvaraṁ pānabhojanaṁ;Vighāto hoti cittassa,disā nappaṭihaññati.
an4.27:1.0.3: Ye cassa dhammā akkhātā,sāmaññassānulomikā;Adhiggahitā tuṭṭhassa,appamattassa sikkhato"ti.
